channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma's Message For Staff After Firing 3,200 Employees

media:content.media:description: Xbox has been losing 64 cents for every dollar it invested in a year.

item.description: In her email to workers, Sharma noted that 1,600 employees will be laid off on Monday, while the remaining ones will be let go over FY27.
item.content:encoded: In her email to workers, Sharma noted that 1,600 employees will be laid off on Monday, while the remaining ones will be let go over FY27.

item.title: India Closes Field Hospital In Venezuela After Earthquake Relief Mission

media:content.media:description: Many survivors and their families expressed their heartfelt gratitude.

item.description: According to the Ministry of External Affairs (MEA), the Army Field Hospital provided timely medical assistance to the people of the country following the disaster.
item.content:encoded: According to the Ministry of External Affairs (MEA), the Army Field Hospital provided timely medical assistance to the people of the country following the disaster.

item.title: American Man Sets World Record By Donating Over 30 Gallons of Blood Over Decades

media:content.media:description: Dan first donated blood in 1980 after his late brother encouraged him to try.

item.description: Dan Ryan from the USA, born on 1 November 1956, has donated over 30 gallons (113.562 litres) of blood to the Red Cross.
item.content:encoded: Dan Ryan from the USA, born on 1 November 1956, has donated over 30 gallons (113.562 litres) of blood to the Red Cross.

item.title: 50 Years On, Lead Pilot Remembers Hostage Rescue In Which Netanyahu's Brother Died

media:content.media:description: A file photo of Israeli PM Benjamin Netanyahu's elder brother.

item.description: In an exclusive interview with NDTV, Brig. Gen. Joshua Shani, the lead pilot who flew the mission, reflected on the planning, execution and enduring legacy of the operation
item.content:encoded: In an exclusive interview with NDTV, Brig. Gen. Joshua Shani, the lead pilot who flew the mission, reflected on the planning, execution and enduring legacy of the operation

item.title: UK Fighter Jets Intercept Russian Plane Near Aircraft Carrier

media:content.media:description: Military experts and European leaders say Russia has ramped up its "hybrid war" tactics.

item.description: A Russian patrol aircraft staged "unsafe" activity near the UK's flagship aircraft carrier as it conducted NATO air defence operations off Iceland, Britain's defence ministry said Monday.
item.content:encoded: A Russian patrol aircraft staged "unsafe" activity near the UK's flagship aircraft carrier as it conducted NATO air defence operations off Iceland, Britain's defence ministry said Monday.

item.title: 528-Bed ICE Facility Near Louisiana Airport Aims To Fast-Track Deportations

media:content.media:description: ICE's New 528-Bed Facility Raises Alarm Over Migrant Children

item.description: A private prison contractor will run the 528-bed site, which advocates warn could detain children far longer than ICE claims.
item.content:encoded: A private prison contractor will run the 528-bed site, which advocates warn could detain children far longer than ICE claims.

item.title: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei Funeral News Updates: Iran Begins Ali Khamenei's Funeral Procession through Tehran

media:content.media:description: Iran Former Supreme Leader's Khamenei Funeral: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's remains arrived in Tehran today.

item.description: Ali Khamenei's Last Rites News Live: Authorities have shut down streets, airspace and daily life for the mourning, which will end on Thursday as the 86-year-old Khamenei is buried at the Imam Reza shrine in Mashhad, his birthplace
item.content:encoded: Ali Khamenei's Last Rites News Live: Authorities have shut down streets, airspace and daily life for the mourning, which will end on Thursday as the 86-year-old Khamenei is buried at the Imam Reza shrine in Mashhad, his birthplace

item.title: Microsoft To Lay Off 4,800 Workers In Latest Wave Of AI-Led Job Cuts

media:content.media:description: Microsoft earlier this year offered voluntary buyouts to about 7 per cent of its US workforce

item.description: Microsoft announced the cuts on Monday following a rough stretch, with its shares falling nearly 23 per cent in the first six months of 2026, their worst first-half performance since 2022.
item.content:encoded: Microsoft announced the cuts on Monday following a rough stretch, with its shares falling nearly 23 per cent in the first six months of 2026, their worst first-half performance since 2022.

item.title: "People Come And Go": Italy Hits Back After Trump's Jibe At Giorgia Meloni

media:content.media:description: Meloni was targeted by Trump last month after the G7 summit.

item.description: Trump on Sunday published a doctored image on his Truth Social platform showing Meloni looking at him as if adoringly.
item.content:encoded: Trump on Sunday published a doctored image on his Truth Social platform showing Meloni looking at him as if adoringly.

item.title: Wildfires Across Europe Force Thousands To Flee Amid Heatwave

media:content.media:description: Rising temperatures in Spain fuelled fears of more blazes.

item.description: The fires are spreading as temperatures rise again -- already reaching 43C in Spain -- in a continent still scarred by the aftermath of heatwaves in May and June that have been blamed for thousands of deaths.
item.content:encoded: The fires are spreading as temperatures rise again -- already reaching 43C in Spain -- in a continent still scarred by the aftermath of heatwaves in May and June that have been blamed for thousands of deaths.

item.title: Chants, Cultural Dances: PM Modi Gets Grand Welcome In Indonesia

media:content.media:description: PM Modi was welcomed at the airport by Indonesian President Prabowo Subianto.

item.description: At the airport, PM Modi witnessed traditional Indonesian performances.
item.content:encoded: At the airport, PM Modi witnessed traditional Indonesian performances.

item.title: In Big Move, Hamas Dissolves Gaza Governing Body After Near 20-Year Rule

media:content.media:description: The NCAG said it was ready to govern Gaza.

item.description: The move marks a significant political shift by Hamas, which has run Gaza since its fighters seized control from rival Palestinian movement Fatah in 2007.
item.content:encoded: The move marks a significant political shift by Hamas, which has run Gaza since its fighters seized control from rival Palestinian movement Fatah in 2007.

item.title: 10 Japan-Linked Tankers Pass Through Hormuz Strait After Months Of Delay
item.description: A fleet of Japan-linked tankers and a Saudi supertanker exited the Strait of Hormuz after being stranded for months due to the Iran war
item.content:encoded: A fleet of Japan-linked tankers and a Saudi supertanker exited the Strait of Hormuz after being stranded for months due to the Iran war

item.title: Burglars Grab Jewellery In Lightning Raid On France's Lalique Museum

media:content.media:description: There was no detail on what exactly was stolen.

item.description: The masked thieves smashed through the door at Musee Lalique in the eastern Alsace region and took around 20 pieces, together worth several millions of euros.
item.content:encoded: The masked thieves smashed through the door at Musee Lalique in the eastern Alsace region and took around 20 pieces, together worth several millions of euros.

item.title: India Helps Unlock Universe's Secrets, From God Particle To Dark Matter

media:content.media:description: India's association with CERN stretches back more than six decades

item.description: Buried deep underground, this extraordinary machine has already transformed humanity's understanding of the universe.
item.content:encoded: Buried deep underground, this extraordinary machine has already transformed humanity's understanding of the universe.

item.title: China Submarine Test Fires Nuclear-Capable Missile Into Pacific

media:content.media:description: Chinese Navy submarine, similar to the one used in Monday's test launch

item.description: China's navy fired a submarine-launched missile into the Pacific, days after warning Pacific nations of the planned test launch
item.content:encoded: China's navy fired a submarine-launched missile into the Pacific, days after warning Pacific nations of the planned test launch

item.title: Video: F-16 And Sukhoi-30 Welcome PM Modi's Aircraft In Indonesian Airspace

media:content.media:description: An F-16 and a Sukhoi-30 fighter jet flies alongside PM Modi's aircraft in Indonesia

item.description: PM Narendra Modi in a post on X said he was "touched by President Prabowo Subianto's gesture of welcoming me at the airport."
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1123437/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>PM Narendra Modi in a post on X said he was "touched by President Prabowo Subianto's gesture of welcoming me at the airport."

item.title: Viral Again: Flying Umbrella That Follows Its User Turns Heads Online

media:content.media:description: He first built a smaller test drone to experiment safely before moving to the larger umbrella.

item.description: The most significant feature of the project is its ability to hover and automatically follow a person.
item.content:encoded: The most significant feature of the project is its ability to hover and automatically follow a person.

item.title: "Like Freedom": How Armenia Became Safe Haven For Russians Fleeing Putin

media:content.media:description: Yerevan has become a safe place for tens of thousands of Russians.

item.description: Since 2022, Armenia's capital, Yerevan, has become a safe place for tens of thousands of Russians who left their country to avoid the war in Ukraine.
item.content:encoded: Since 2022, Armenia's capital, Yerevan, has become a safe place for tens of thousands of Russians who left their country to avoid the war in Ukraine.

item.title: Trade, Defence And Critical Minerals: What Is On PM Modi's Australia Agenda

media:content.media:description: As both countries seek to diversify supply chains

item.description: The visit comes as India and Australia have elevated their relationship into a comprehensive strategic partnership, with both nations emerging as key players in maintaining a free, open, and inclusive Indo-Pacific amid growing geopolitical uncertainties.
item.content:encoded: The visit comes as India and Australia have elevated their relationship into a comprehensive strategic partnership, with both nations emerging as key players in maintaining a free, open, and inclusive Indo-Pacific amid growing geopolitical uncertainties.
